description: Long-poll for the next block sealed after 'obsoleteHash'. Maps to PoolHash WaitForBlock(PoolHash obsolete). Returns the next pool's hash (base58) plus a 'changed' flag.
notes: If 'obsoleteHash' is omitted, the gateway calls GetLastHash() first so the call returns at the next sealed block (instead of returning immediately). 'timeoutMs' is clamped to WAIT_MAX_TIMEOUT_MS (default 120000); the underlying socket waits 5s longer. Aliases: 'ObsoleteHash', 'hash', 'Hash'.
